metadata.description: Three reminders for LLM coding pitfalls in Claude Code Opus 4.7+ — Traditional Chinese (Taiwan) localization

plugins.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
plugins.description: Three reminders that complement Claude Code's built-in guidance: stop when confused, every changed line traces to the request, loop on declarative goals. Includes /dec slash command for explicit declarative reframing. Traditional Chinese (Taiwan) localization fork of forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills.
